name: Jambalaya I
recipeIngredient: 1 Head garlic, separated into cloves, the cloves peeled
1 small Bunch fresh basil (or 2 tablespoons dried)
1 small Bunch fresh oregano (or 2 tablespoons dried)
2 cups Sun-dried tomatoes, cut into pieces
2 lbs Boneless chicken, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Puree celery, peppers, onions, garlic, and herbs (except bay leaf) in a food processor.
2. Transfer to a large pot; add canned tomatoes, sun-dried tomatoes, chicken, bay leaves, and chile powder. Cover and bring to a boil.
3. Reduce heat to medium and cook for about 35 minutes.
4. Thinly slice the Andouille sausage and roast in a 350°F oven for about 15 minutes (this will render out grease). Add sausage to the pot and reduce heat to a simmer.
5. Cook for about 30 minutes, then add shrimp and cook for about 5 minutes.
6. Season with salt to taste. Serve over rice.
From George Louie.
Serves 10 to 12.
Per serving: 495 calories, 57g protein, 21g carbohydrate, 24g fat (6g saturated), 214mg cholesterol, 957mg sodium, 5g fiber.
